calendar.matters:
Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrers To Complaint
Off Calendar Sep-16-2022 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Jonathan Fink, 949.477.5050 of Wright, Finlay & Zak LLP appearing via Zoom for Respondent Wilmington Savings Fund Society.
No other appaearances.

Discussed. The Court rules as follows: RESPONDENT WILMINGTON SAVINGS FUND SOCIETY , FSB D/B/A Notice Of Demurrer And Demurrers To Complaint is SUSTAINED with 10 days to leave to amend to address in good faith all issues raised by demurrer and/or allege any viable cause of action. Respondent to prepare order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (D501)
